YP-01.name: Drop-and-Hook Operations
YP-01.finding: WeatherTech operates 11 manufacturing/fulfillment facilities with inbound raw materials and outbound finished goods. Drop-and-hook is plausible at scale but no direct source confirms it.
YP-01.note: Inferred from manufacturing business model. Not sufficient to confirm.

YP-02.name: 24/7 Operations
YP-02.finding: Not covered in research brief. Multi-shift manufacturing is common at this revenue scale but not confirmed for WeatherTech.

YP-03.name: 50+ Dock Doors
YP-03.finding: Facility specs not available in public sources. 11 facilities suggests this is plausible but unverifiable without property records.

YP-04.name: 200,000+ Sq Ft Facility
YP-04.finding: With 11 facilities and $500M+ revenue in manufacturing, at least some facilities almost certainly exceed 200K sq ft. Industrial properties in Bolingbrook avg 340K sq ft per CommercialCafe data. No direct confirmation.

LS-01.name: New Supply Chain Leader (hired last 18 months)
LS-01.finding: No new VP Supply Chain, VP Logistics, or VP DC Operations hire found across LinkedIn, press, or news sources. Leadership search returned only CEO David MacNeil profile.

LB-01.name: In-House Yard Jobs Currently Posted
LB-01.finding: Searched 'spotter driver', 'yard truck driver', 'hostler driver', 'yard jockey' on JobSpy across Indeed, LinkedIn, ZipRecruiter. Zero results for WeatherTech. Active postings found are CDL Driver/Forklift Operator — logistics exist but yard-specific roles are absent.

LB-02.name: Repeat Postings (same role posted 2+ times)
LB-02.finding: No yard-specific postings found, so repeat posting cannot be assessed.

GR-01.name: New DC Opening Announced or Under Construction
GR-01.finding: 12th facility currently under development. Type not confirmed — based on company pattern, likely manufacturing. No location disclosed. Cannot confirm as distribution center without additional research.
GR-01.note: Would upgrade to C if facility type confirmed as DC.

GR-02.name: M&A Activity
GR-02.finding: Private company. No M&A news found. Company appears stable under founder ownership.

SU-01.name: WAIRE Compliance Mandate
SU-01.finding: All confirmed WeatherTech facilities are in Illinois (Bolingbrook, Downers Grove, Clarendon Hills). WAIRE program applies to California only.

SU-02.name: ESG / Scope 3 Emissions Commitments
SU-02.finding: Not researched. No ESG report found in web search. Private company — likely no CDP or GRI disclosure.

SF-01.name: OSHA Citation Received
SF-01.finding: Not researched in brief. Would require OSHA IILS database lookup for MacNeil Automotive Products.

FN-01.name: PE Owned or PE-Backed
FN-01.finding: Privately owned by founder David MacNeil. No PE firm confirmed. Multiple sources confirm family/founder ownership.

FN-02.name: Cost-Cut Language in Public Communications
FN-02.finding: Private company — no earnings calls, no public 10-K. Cannot research without insider access.

CT-01.name: Incumbent Vendor Known
CT-01.finding: No yard management vendor identified. LinkedIn profiles of operations staff not researched.

DX-01.name: Founder/CEO Accepting Outside Role
DX-01.finding: David MacNeil (Founder/CEO) nominated by the White House for FTC commissioner seat — January 2026. If confirmed by Senate: 'required to step back from day-to-day involvement in WeatherTech and adhere to federal ethics requirements.'
DX-01.impact: CONFIRMED → account moves to PENDING. Do not outreach.
DX-01.reactivation_condition: Senate confirmation outcome — if rejected or withdrawn, reactivate. If confirmed, set 12-month monitor.

DX-03.finding: No layoffs or hiring freeze found. 29 active jobs in Bolingbrook as of June 2026.
